projects.title: Production Management System
projects.description: A comprehensive production management system integrated with Google BigQuery, providing end-to-end product traceability from manufacturing through quality assurance. The platform enables real-time monitoring, production data management, and operational visibility through a centralized dashboard.
projects.longDescription:
This project is a web-based production management system developed using HTML, CSS, and JavaScript for the frontend, with Python as the backend. It is integrated with Google BigQuery to manage and monitor production data throughout the entire manufacturing lifecycle.

The system provides real-time updates and supports essential CRUD (Create, Read, Update, Delete) operations for production data management. It also includes a role-based access control system, allowing administrators to configure user permissions and access levels based on organizational requirements.

The platform serves as a centralized dashboard for managing production activities, tracking product traceability, and monitoring operational workflows. Users can monitor production output, inventory movement, quality assurance records, and other critical manufacturing data through a unified interface.

Deployed on a Raspberry Pi, the system is currently used internally within the organization to improve data visibility, streamline operational processes, and support more efficient decision-making.

projects.title: Inventory Management System
projects.description: A comprehensive inventory management system designed to track stock movements in real time, manage product information throughout the manufacturing process, and streamline inventory operations through a centralized dashboard with CRUD functionality.
projects.longDescription:
A comprehensive inventory management system designed to track stock movements in real time, manage product information throughout the manufacturing process, and streamline inventory operations through a centralized dashboard with CRUD functionality.

This project was developed to improve inventory tracking and product flow management by integrating a centralized database solution. The system enables users to monitor stock availability, record stock-in and stock-out transactions, and maintain detailed product information throughout the manufacturing lifecycle.

To enhance performance and scalability, the platform was migrated from Google Sheets to Google BigQuery, providing faster data processing, improved data management, and a more efficient workflow for daily operations.

projects.title: Production Tracking System
projects.description: A production tracking system designed to scan product barcodes on the production line and provide real-time traceability throughout the manufacturing process.
projects.longDescription:
This project is a production tracking system developed to improve product traceability and visibility throughout the manufacturing process. The system scans product barcodes directly on the production line and records tracking information in real time.

Built using HTML, CSS, and JavaScript for the frontend, with Python as the backend, the system is deployed on Raspberry Pi hardware and integrated with Google BigQuery for centralized data storage and management.

Each scanned barcode is linked to production records, enabling operators and management teams to monitor product movement, track production status, and maintain accurate manufacturing data throughout the production lifecycle.

The system is integrated with the Production Management Dashboard, providing real-time updates and supporting end-to-end product traceability across manufacturing operations.

projects.title: Inventory Tracking System
projects.description: An inventory tracking system designed to scan and track inventory items using mobile barcode scanners, providing real-time inventory visibility and seamless integration with the Inventory Management System.
projects.longDescription:
This project is an inventory tracking system developed to improve inventory visibility and streamline stock management operations. The system enables users to scan item barcodes using mobile devices, allowing inventory movements to be recorded and tracked in real time.

Built using web technologies and integrated with a centralized database, the platform captures inventory transactions and synchronizes data with the Inventory Management System. This ensures accurate inventory records and provides up-to-date stock information across operations.

The mobile-based scanning workflow allows staff to perform inventory tracking directly from smartphones without requiring dedicated scanning hardware, improving accessibility and operational efficiency.

By integrating with the Inventory Management System, the solution supports inventory traceability, stock movement monitoring, and real-time inventory updates, helping maintain accurate inventory records and reducing manual data entry.

projects.title: Smart Surau Occupancy Monitoring System
projects.description: An IoT-based surau occupancy monitoring system powered by Raspberry Pi 5 and Arduino, utilizing ultrasonic sensors to detect occupancy status and provide real-time updates through a web dashboard.
projects.longDescription:
Developed an IoT-based surau occupancy monitoring system using Raspberry Pi 5, Arduino, and ultrasonic sensors to provide real-time visibility of surau usage. The system detects the presence of occupants and allows users to indicate male or female occupancy status through dedicated controls.

Raspberry Pi 5 serves as the central controller, processing occupancy data and synchronizing status updates with a web-based dashboard. To ensure accurate information, the system automatically resets occupancy indicators when no presence is detected for a predefined duration, preventing outdated status information from being displayed.

The solution enables users to remotely check surau availability and occupancy status in real time through a centralized monitoring platform.

projects.title: AI Production Item Counting System
projects.description: An AI-powered counting automation system utilizing YOLO-based computer vision and Cytron IRIV Edge AI hardware for real-time product counting on production lines. The system is designed to automate counting processes for Cytron Technologies products with high accuracy and low latency.
projects.longDescription:
This project is a customized AI vision solution developed to automate product counting and quality inspection on a manufacturing production line. The system utilizes YOLO-based object detection running on Cytron IRIV Edge AI hardware to identify, track, and count products in real time.

The solution was specifically designed for high-speed conveyor systems, where products move at speeds ranging from 10 to 15 meters per second. To achieve reliable performance, extensive work was carried out in hardware selection, camera positioning, dataset collection, annotation, and AI model training.

Beyond automated item counting, the system also performs visual inspection to verify the presence of required product features. This helps reduce manual inspection efforts while improving production accuracy, efficiency, and consistency.

The system is deployed as an edge AI solution, enabling real-time processing directly on-site without relying on cloud infrastructure, making it suitable for industrial environments requiring low latency and continuous operation.

projects.title: AI Production Monitoring Dashboard
projects.description: Developed an industrial web-based dashboard integrated with an AI object detection system for real-time production item counting and monitoring.
projects.longDescription:
This project is a web-based production monitoring dashboard integrated with an AI-powered object detection and counting system. The system automatically detects and counts items from camera feeds in real time, reducing the need for manual counting processes.

The dashboard provides a centralized platform for users to monitor production counts, view live updates, and access historical counting records. Production data is collected and displayed through an intuitive interface, allowing operators and supervisors to track production activities efficiently.

Developed using modern web technologies with a Python backend, the system enables real-time visibility of production output and supports better operational monitoring through automated data collection and reporting.

projects.title: Order Tracking System
projects.description: An order tracking system designed to streamline the fulfillment process by tracking customer orders and verifying parcel collection. The system helps ensure that the correct items are handed over to the correct customers while reducing the risk of missing or misplaced orders.
projects.longDescription:
This project is an order tracking and fulfillment verification system developed on Raspberry Pi 5 to improve parcel collection accuracy and operational efficiency.

The system consists of two interconnected interfaces. The first interface is used to register and manage customer order information, while the second interface is dedicated to fulfillment verification, allowing staff to confirm that the correct customer has collected the correct parcel before handover.

To enhance security and accountability, the system is integrated with a camera module that captures evidence during the collection process. This helps provide additional verification records and reduces the risk of disputes, missing parcels, or unauthorized collections.

The solution streamlines order fulfillment operations by providing a structured verification workflow, ensuring accurate parcel handovers and improving overall operational reliability.

projects.title: Car Workshop Management System
projects.description: A web-based workshop management system developed for an automotive service company in Qatar, enabling efficient management of work orders, vehicle servicing, mechanic assignments, and operational workflows.
projects.longDescription:
This project is a web-based workshop management system developed for an automotive service company in Qatar to streamline workshop operations and improve job tracking efficiency.

The system is powered by Raspberry Pi 5 and integrated with RFID technology to manage and monitor service workflows throughout the workshop. It enables staff to create work orders, assign jobs to mechanics, track job progress, and maintain service records from start to completion.

Through a centralized dashboard, supervisors can monitor ongoing tasks, manage mechanic assignments, and ensure that service operations are executed efficiently. The RFID integration provides an additional layer of automation for job identification and tracking, reducing manual errors and improving operational visibility.

The platform helps standardize workshop processes, improve workflow management, and maintain accurate records of vehicle servicing activities.

projects.title: AI Vision Showcase
projects.description: A concept dashboard developed to showcase AI vision solutions for industrial applications, demonstrating various use cases such as object detection, pose estimation, and intelligent automation for marketing and product demonstration purposes.
projects.longDescription:
This project was developed as a marketing and demonstration platform to showcase the capabilities of AI vision technologies for industrial applications.

Throughout the project, more than 11 AI vision proof-of-concept solutions were researched, developed, and evaluated to address various industrial challenges. The work involved dataset collection, data annotation, model training, testing, and deployment across multiple AI vision use cases.

The platform demonstrates a wide range of computer vision applications, including object detection, object counting, workplace safety monitoring, pose estimation, and industrial automation solutions. It serves as a centralized dashboard for presenting AI capabilities to potential customers, partners, and internal stakeholders.

The project also provided valuable experience in AI model development, dataset preparation, hardware integration, and real-world deployment considerations for edge AI systems.

projects.title: Al Workplace Safety Monitoring System
projects.description: An AI-powered workplace safety monitoring system designed to detect handrail compliance during stair usage using pose estimation technology. The system provides real-time monitoring, event logging, and dashboard-based reporting for industrial safety management.
projects.longDescription:
This project is an AI-powered workplace safety monitoring system developed to improve safety compliance in industrial environments. The system uses pose estimation techniques to determine whether personnel are properly using handrails while ascending or descending stairways.

The solution is deployed on Cytron IRIV Edge AI hardware, enabling real-time computer vision processing directly on the edge without relying on cloud infrastructure. To achieve reliable detection performance, extensive effort was invested in algorithm development, pose analysis logic, testing, and optimization under real-world operating conditions.

The system continuously monitors handrail usage, records safety-related events, and stores detection results for analysis and reporting. A centralized dashboard was developed to provide operational visibility, allowing users to review compliance records, monitor safety events, and maintain historical data for auditing purposes.

By automating safety monitoring processes, the solution helps organizations improve workplace safety awareness, reduce manual observation efforts, and support compliance with safety procedures.

projects.title: Data Integration & Management Tool
projects.description: A custom-built data integration and management tool that enables users to connect, filter, transform, and visualize data from multiple database tables through an interactive drag-and-drop interface without requiring manual SQL queries.
projects.longDescription:
This project is a web-based data integration and management tool developed to simplify the process of combining and analyzing data from multiple database tables. The platform provides a visual interface that allows users to select datasets, define relationships between tables, and generate custom data views without writing SQL statements.

Users can dynamically connect tables by mapping related columns, apply advanced filtering conditions, and customize the data structure through an intuitive drag-and-drop workflow. The system automatically processes the relationships and generates a unified result set for preview and analysis.

To improve accessibility for non-technical users, the platform abstracts complex database operations into a user-friendly interface, enabling faster data exploration and reducing dependency on manual query development.

The tool also supports exporting processed datasets, making it suitable for reporting, operational analysis, and internal data management workflows.
